_comment: Stryker mutation testing config. Pure JS modules in src/ are the priority — background.js depends on chrome.* globals so we exclude it from mutation (its logic is best covered by manual smoke tests, not mutation).
_mutate_comment: constants.js excluded — pure value declarations where every mutation survives because no behavior depends on the literal numeric/string. background.js excluded — chrome.* MV3 alarm wiring is unit-untestable.
